purpose: Evaluate whether parent-level max aggregation improves bursty labels.
Use mean probabilities for stable labels and max probabilities for audience/silence labels from the segment-probability CSV.
command: Post-hoc pandas calculation from parent_eval_segment_probs_fixed_0p5_max.csv; no model retraining.
output: Macro-F1 improved from 0.7801 to 0.8320 with high Micro-F1 retained.
